Little Inferno HD

Welcome to Little Inferno HD! You run a virtual fireplace where you burn toys and items to discover mysterious combos. Purchase items from catalogs using coins earned from burning, then drag them into the fire to watch them burn with unique effects. Discover hidden combos by burning specific item combinations together to earn stamps and unlock new catalogs. Progress through the story by continuously burning items and discovering all available combos. There's no losing - just explore, experiment, and uncover the secrets of the fireplace!

Arrow Keys: Navigate item selection in catalog | Space: Purchase selected item from catalog | Shift: Grab/release item (hold to drag item to fireplace) | Z: Open/close catalog | ESC: Pause/unpause game | ENTER: Start game | R: Restart game

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic game mechanics: purchasing items from the catalog, dragging items to the fireplace, and burning them. Validates that coins are earned from burning items and that the player can purchase new items with those coins.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Opens catalog, purchases first available item, closes catalog, grabs the item, drags it to fireplace center, releases it to start burning. Waits for item to burn completely and coins to be awarded. Repeats process to validate the core loop.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Items are successfully purchased when player has enough coins. Items burn when placed in fireplace and award coins upon completion. Game state correctly tracks coins, inventory, and burning items. No errors occur during basic gameplay loop.
